series_metadata.series_description: Records received or generated in connection with the Workforce Investment Act (WIA) and the impact on the agency. This is an ongoing act with occasional changes. Records may include: legislation, WIA Fact Sheets, Confidentiality Information, Workforce Development Department of Labor draft regulations, education, funding, Governor’s Workforce Policy Board information, LSC Study, local boards and contacts, OBES State Implementation Team, Ohio Option, Ohio Works, Performance Measurements, OOD task forces, State Plan, Transition Team documentation, training and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The Act is ongoing and the records may be updated, superseded or become obsolete. Destroy when no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: The Act is ongoing and the records may be updated, superseded or become obsolete. Destroy when no longer of administrative value., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
